text: Your plan arrives in a durable tactical binder built to live on your shelf and survive real use.
Every component organized and ready — pull it out, hand it to a first responder, and they have everything they need.
The master document. Scenario-by-scenario instructions personalized to your home, your layout, and your family.
Visual escape matrix for when movement isn't blocked. One glance, everyone knows their role.
Detailed role assignments for every family member, every step of the Yellow Brick Road scenario.
Visual shelter-in-place matrix for when smoke or fire is blocking movement.
Detailed step-by-step Alamo instructions when movement out of the home is not possible.
Floor plan, occupant details, rally points, and hazard notes — everything a firefighter needs in the first 60 seconds.
Emergency contacts, medical info, rally points, and utility shutoffs. Laminated and posted where your family finds it fast.
